evals.prompt: Set up Supabase auth with GitHub OAuth in my Next.js App Router project — I need users to be able to sign in with their GitHub account
evals.expected: Reads references/auth.md and references/nextjs.md, produces correct OAuth setup with createBrowserClient/createServerClient from @supabase/ssr, callback route handler, and middleware

evals.prompt: Write a RLS policy so users can only read their own rows from the 'documents' table, and authenticated users can insert new documents
evals.expected: Reads references/rls.md, produces correct SQL with ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY and policies using auth.uid() = user_id for SELECT and INSERT WITH CHECK

evals.prompt: How do I subscribe to realtime updates on the posts table so my React component updates whenever a new post is inserted?
evals.expected: Reads references/realtime.md, produces correct channel subscription with postgres_changes event, INSERT filter, useEffect cleanup to remove channel on unmount
